3182270.name: Changeling VR
3182270.description:
ChangelingVR is a virtual reality first-person interactive mystery. You play as detective Aurelia Walker, a private eye gifted with the unique ability to dream-walk, allowing you to see the thoughts and memories of anyone you touch. This gift leads the Summers-Manalo family to hire you, their last resort in discovering what is wrong with their baby. As you make contact with the mother, the father, and their two kids, you must use your mystical powers, as well as your skills of deduction, to enter their minds and make your way through their manifested hopes and fears to save the young child.

Currently we have a curated story mode experience that includes our 4 most developed levels.

The Acts:

The Detective

You begin within the mind of Aurelia. Here you are introduced to player controls. After awakening in your apartment, you will make way to the Monelo-Summers home and meet people in the neighborhood. With a touch you may see their memories along the way.

Angela: Mother's Fear

As Angela, you float through the detritus of memory trying to capture her family before they disappear. you will use shoot out ties to both move and grasp your family.

Dylan: I Got This

Dylan, the father, is faced with a series of puzzles. This level has physical puzzles set in first his commute which bleeds into his home. The level is in prototype stage.

Douglas: Scribbles and Dreams

Dougie is trying to understand what is happening to his family through his drawings. In this level you slingshot your way through puzzle platforms in his sketchbook.
3182270.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
developers: RIT students from the School of Interactive Games and Media and College of Art and Design
